sections.heading: Exercise 1 — Self-Introduction (translate into Chinese)
sections.text:
1. My name is ____________.
2. I am Filipino.
3. I am ____ years old.
4. My birthday is on ____ year ____ month ____ date.
5. I am married / I am not married.
6. I lived at ____________.

sections.heading: Exercise 2 — Numerals, Time & Calendar (write in Chinese)
sections.text:
1. 45,786
2. 567,890
3. 13,689,005
4. 24,242,242
5. 7:15am
6. 9:32pm
7. Monday 8:20am
8. August 18
9. First week of March
10. Next Tuesday

items.pinyin: Lǎo shī hěn piào liàng.
Bà ba hěn è.
Xué shēng hěn wán pí.
Yī shēng hěn dān xīn.
Wǒ de gē ge bǐ jiào gāo.

items.english: Mother is very intelligent and very hard working.
items.pinyin: Mā ma hěn cōng míng hé hěn qín láo.
Tā hěn xǐ huān tā de lín jū.

items.english: Mr Chen is very rich. Miss Li is very poor.
items.chinese: 陳先生很富有。李小姐很窮。
items.pinyin: Chén xiān shēng hěn fù yǒu. Lǐ xiǎo jiě hěn qióng.

items.english: The workers are very lazy. Our boss is very angry.
items.chinese: 工人很懶惰。我們的老闆很生氣，
items.pinyin: Gōng rén hěn lǎn duò. Wǒ men de lǎo bǎn hěn shēng qì,
Nà gè shēng yì rén hěn máng.
Wǒ zài chī fàn.
Wǒ de lǎo bǎn zài shuì jiào.
Hái zi zài wán.
Lǎo shī zài xiào.

items.english: Sister wants to take a bath.
items.pinyin: Jiě jie xiǎng yào xǐ zǎo.
Bà ba yào jì qián.

items.english: The maid takes care of my younger brother.
items.pinyin: Yōng rén zhào gù wǒ de dì di.

items.english: The students had studied the lessons.
items.pinyin: Xué shēng yǐ jīng dú shū.

items.english: Mother washed the clothes at 10 am.
items.chinese: 媽媽早上十點(已經)洗衣服。
items.pinyin: Mā ma zǎo shàng shí diǎn (yǐ jīng) xǐ yī fú.

items.english: That worker wants to earn money.
items.pinyin: Nà gè gōng rén xiǎng yào zhuàn qián.
Wǒ qù (dào) cài shì chǎng.

items.english: She wants to go to church.
items.pinyin: Tā (xiǎng) yào qù jiào táng.
Bà ba yào (huì) qù bàn gōng shì.
Fēi jī chǎng hěn jìn.
Shāng chǎng tài dà.
Gōng rén zài cāng kù gōng zuò.

items.english: The students went to school at 6 am.
items.pinyin: Xué shēng zǎo shàng liù diǎn qù xué xiào.

items.english: My friend went to drug store at 2 pm.
items.chinese: 我的朋友下午兩點去藥房。
items.pinyin: Wǒ de péng yǒu xià wǔ liǎng diǎn qù yào fáng.

items.chinese: 從早上八點到下午五點。
items.pinyin: Cóng zǎo shàng bā diǎn dào xià wǔ wǔ diǎn.

items.english: From bus station to the park is very far.
items.pinyin: Cóng gōng chē zhàn dào gōng yuán hěn yuǎn.
Wǒ de qún zi shì hóng sè.
Tā de yǔ sǎn hěn dà.
Bà ba yào dà mǎ wài tào
Tā men xǐ huān lán sè de chèn shān.
Wǒ de lǎo bǎn yǒu hěn duō shǒu jī.
Zhè gè shǒu biǎo tài guì.
Nà gè pí jiá hěn pián yí.
Wǒ wàng jì fù qián.
Qǐng gěi wǒ xiǎo mǎ.
Zhào xiàng jī huài le.
